task_params.subject: Interest in helping with a local mentorship program
body_points: Introduce myself as Joseph Eldridge from Durham
Say I am interested in helping build a local mentorship program
Mention my background in electrical engineering and mentoring junior engineers
Offer to help shape structure, topics, and volunteer support
Ask whether the chapter is exploring this and if a short call would help
